title.en: Victorious Portugal pay emotional tribute to Jota

summary.en: One year after his death, Portugal are using Diogo Jota's memory to help inspire them at the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 在他去世一年后，葡萄牙正在利用Diogo Jota的记忆来帮助他们在2026年世界杯上获得灵感。

title.en: Portugal through to last 16 after dramatic victory over Croatia
title.zh-CN: 在克罗地亚取得戏剧性胜利后，葡萄牙队取得了16强的成绩

summary.en: Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 with goals from Cristiano Ronaldo and Goncalo Ramos after a chaotic second-half in Toronto to set up a last 16 tie with Iberian rivals Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 在多伦多下半场混乱之后，葡萄牙以克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）和贡萨洛·拉莫斯（ Goncalo Ramos ）的进球以2比1击败克罗地亚，与伊比利亚对手西班牙建立了最后16个平局。

title.en: Late VAR drama as Croatia denied equaliser
title.zh-CN: 克罗地亚拒绝均衡器的后期VAR戏剧

summary.en: Josko Gvardiol's stoppage-time goal is ruled out for offside after a VAR review, denying Croatia an equaliser against Portugal in their World Cup knockout match in Toronto.
summary.zh-CN: 在VAR审查后， Josko Gvardiol的停赛时间目标被排除在越位之外，否认克罗地亚在多伦多的世界杯淘汰赛中对阵葡萄牙的均衡器。

title.en: Ronaldo levels from penalty spot for Portugal
title.zh-CN: 罗纳尔多在葡萄牙点球位置的水平

summary.en: Portugal captain Cristiano Ronaldo draws his side level from the penalty spot against Croatia during their round of 32 game in Toronto.
summary.zh-CN: 葡萄牙队长克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）在多伦多举行的32轮比赛中，在对阵克罗地亚的点球赛中获得了侧位。

title.en: Ronaldo has equaliser ruled out for offside
title.zh-CN: 罗纳尔多将扳平比分排除在越位之外

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo has an equalising goal ruled out for offside during Portugal's round of 32 game with Croatia in Toronto.
summary.zh-CN: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多（ Cristiano Ronaldo ）在葡萄牙与克罗地亚队在多伦多举行的32轮比赛中被排除在越位球之外。

title.en: England into last 16 - what is their path to the final?
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队进入16强-他们进入决赛的道路是什么？

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after progressing the last 16
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台（ BBC Sport ）了解英格兰队在晋级16强后需要做些什么才能进入决赛

title.en: Ndoye doubles Switzerland's lead vs Algeria LIVE!
title.zh-CN: Ndoye将瑞士的领先优势与阿尔及利亚的现场比赛翻了一番！

title.en: Late VAR drama as Portugal beat Croatia to keep Ronaldo's World Cup dreams alive
title.zh-CN: 晚期VAR戏剧：葡萄牙击败克罗地亚，让罗纳尔多的世界杯梦想得以实现

summary.en: Cristiano Ronaldo's World Cup dreams were kept alive in controversial fashion as he helped his Portugal side fight back from a goal down to beat Croatia 2-1 and set up a mouth-watering last-16 tie...
summary.zh-CN: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多的世界杯梦想以有争议的方式保持活力，因为他帮助葡萄牙队从进球中反击，以2比1击败克罗地亚，并在最后16场比赛中建立了一个令人垂涎欲滴的平局...

title.en: Ramos sends Portugal into last 16 as VAR drama caps wild finish against Croatia
title.zh-CN: 拉莫斯将葡萄牙送入最后16名，因为VAR戏剧在对阵克罗地亚的比赛中取得了胜利

summary.en: Rafael Leão dropped to his knees. His cross had just been flicked into the net by Gonçalo Ramos to take Portugal to the last 16 of the World Cup. Leão’s expression was not one of delight, but...
summary.zh-CN: 拉斐尔·莱昂跪了下来。他的十字架刚刚被贡萨洛·拉莫斯（ Gonçalo Ramos ）甩入网中，带领葡萄牙进入世界杯的最后16场比赛。Leão的表情不是愉悦的表情，而是……

title.en: Switzerland v Algeria: World Cup 2026 last 32 – live
title.zh-CN: 瑞士v阿尔及利亚： 2026年世界杯最后32场–直播

summary.en: ⚽️ Kick-off time: 8pm local/1pm AEST/4am BST/11pm EDT⚽️ Player guide | Bracketology | Golden Boot | Mail MartinThe smallest details can make a difference at the World Cup.All eyes will be on...

title.en: Melting hot! When Ireland played Mexico in 43C heat at 1994 World Cup
title.zh-CN: 火热融化！ 1994年世界杯，爱尔兰队在43摄氏度的高温下与墨西哥队比赛

summary.en: As the mercury rises at this year’s World Cup, we asked former Republic of Ireland footballers Jason McAteer and John Aldridge about the infamous match in Orlando that was played in 43 degree...
summary.zh-CN: 随着今年世界杯的汞含量上升，我们向前爱尔兰共和国足球运动员Jason McAteer和John Aldridge询问了奥兰多那场臭名昭著的43度比赛……

title.en: Socceroos ‘prepared’ to face Egypt’s Mo Salah who is fit for last-32 clash after injury
title.zh-CN: 足球运动员“准备好”面对埃及的Mo Salah ，他适合受伤后的最后32场冲突

summary.en: ‘We feel relaxed, we feel confident’: Australia’s Tony PopovicPharaohs coach Hossam Hassan unsure whether veteran will startThe Socceroos are set to face Mo Salah in their last 32 match, though...
summary.zh-CN: “我们感到轻松，我们感到自信” ：澳大利亚法老队教练Hossam Hassan不确定老将是否会首发。不过， Socceroos将在最后32场比赛中面对Mo Salah……

title.en: Ange Postecoglou is exactly what Japan need after fifth-straight World Cup knockout loss | John Duerden
title.zh-CN: Ange Postecoglou正是日本连续第五次世界杯淘汰赛失利后所需要的| John Duerden

summary.en: The Samurai Blue’s toughest opponents are themselves. The Australian coach would help them kick down the door to football’s global eliteAs Japan’s players burst into tears after losing to Brazil in...
summary.zh-CN: 武士蓝最强的对手是他们自己。这位澳大利亚教练将帮助他们踢开足球全球精英的大门，因为日本球员在输给巴西后泪流满面...

title.en: England, France & Spain v Portugal on BBC in last 16
title.zh-CN: 英格兰、法国和西班牙对葡萄牙在英国广播公司的最后16场比赛

summary.en: England's meeting with Mexico is one of four World Cup last-16 matches to be broadcast live on BBC One, BBC iPlayer and across BBC Sport.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队与墨西哥队的比赛是在BBC One、BBC iPlayer和BBC Sport直播的四场世界杯最后16场比赛之一。

title.en: Oyarzabal scores twice as Spain cruise past Austria
title.zh-CN: Oyarzabal的得分是西班牙巡航经过奥地利的两倍

summary.en: Mikel Oyarzabal scores in each half to help Spain beat Austria 3-0 in their World Cup last-32 match in Los Angeles.
summary.zh-CN: 米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）在每半场比赛中得分，帮助西班牙在洛杉矶举行的世界杯最后32场比赛中以3-0击败奥地利

summary.en: Senegal midfielder Pape Gueye says he will be "taking a break" from playing for his country while the current management is in charge.

title.en: McInnes biggest factor in McCrorie's Rangers return

summary.en: Ross McCrorie is adamant Derek McInnes has the qualities to be a success at Rangers, saying the manager was the number one reason he turned down offers to remain in England for a return to Ibrox.

title.en: First Afcon, now World Cup - Senegal trapped in 'football hell'

summary.en: Senegal's nightmarish year continues, with a heart-breaking collapse against Belgium featuring late penalty drama which was remarkably similar to events in this year's chaotic Afcon final.
